Current UI copy includes the operator-facing partnerships labels: Поиск партнёров, Поиск лидов, Воронка, Черновики, Отправка, Отправлено.

criteria.text: Settings nested components have fewer legacy visual patterns.
proof: AIAgentSettings now uses a calm white header card and quieter enabled-agent surfaces instead of the former dark hero treatment.
TelegramConnection uses a neutral card shell and slate primary button, with no btn-iridescent class.
WhatsAppConnection, ExternalIntegrations, AdminExternalCabinetSettings, WABACredentials, TelegramBotCredentials, and NetworkManagement use quieter borders/surfaces in the inspected current files.
AIAgentSettings still has a gradient switch accent and unused gradient metadata, but the acceptance target was fewer legacy visual patterns, not complete removal of every gradient token.
